fixes.origin:
command = f"ping -c 1 {hostname} && echo MODE={mode}"
result = subprocess.run(
    command,
    shell=True,
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
)
fixes.replacement:
result = subprocess.run(
    ["ping", "-c", "1", hostname],
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
)
result.stdout += f"\nMODE={mode}"
